items.title: Tested: ORICO’s folder-shaped SSD brings some personality and performance at a solid price [Deal]
items.summary:
It’s becoming increasingly difficult to remain excited about SSDs these days, thanks to rising prices driven by industry-wide hikes and ongoing memory shortages. That’s exactly why I believe drives like the ORICO iFolder Go feel like a breath of fresh air in a market that doesn’t offer much to get excited about lately. This SSD, as you can probably tell, sports a very unconventional design that looks nothing like the external drives we’re used to seeing. It’s easily among the most unique SSDs in my stash. But is there more to it than just good looks? Does it actually deliver the performance to back up its unique design? Head below to find out.

items.title: The advanced EGO 21-inch Select Cut Touch Drive cordless electric mower + 2x 4.0Ah batteries hits a new $543 low ($236 off)
items.summary:
Amazon is giving us a new all-time low price on the popular and advanced EGO Power+ 56V 21-inch Select Cut Touch Drive Cordless Electric Self-Propelled Lawn Mower with 2x 4.0Ah batteries and rapid charger for $543.20 shipped. This particular bundle would normally run you $779 at full price, and we’ve previously seen it taken down as low as $582 before today’s deal. Now, you’re getting an even larger $236 markdown that lands it at a new all-time low price, with even more EGO tool deals available in the official Amazon storefront here.

more…

items.title: Heads up! DJI’s Osmo Pocket 3 vlogging camera down is down to $399 low
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale everyday gear, Woot is offering DJI’s Osmo Pocket 3 4K vlogging camera for $399.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). While the camera originally debuted at $519, a series of price hikes since its launch pushed it to around $800 before eventually settling at its current $499 usual going at Amazon and other major retailers. Discounts on this particular camera have been rather rare, with only a few so far dropping it down from its full price. Today’s deal marks the return of the lowest price we first tracked for it earlier this as part of a similar Woot offer. It remains a solid pick despite the arrival of its successor, the Osmo Pocket 4, and it’s definitely worth grabbing at this discounted rate.

more…

items.title: Meta’s Oversight Board says account bans lack due process, transparency
items.summary: Meta's board cites "due process" concerns over account bans. It's also pushing Meta to offer clear information about violations and its use in AI in making its determinations.

items.title: Segway’s 1,024Wh Cube 1000 power station hits second-lowest $330 price while the 2,048Wh Cube 2000 drops to $539 low
items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Segway 1,024Wh Cube 1000 Portable Power Station for $329.98 shipped, beating out the direct website by $670, and the larger 2,048Wh Cube 2000 Portable Power Station for $538.97 shipped, also beating the direct website by $1,161. You may see these two models carrying $1,000 and $1,700 MSRPs direct from Segway, but at Amazon they only ever go as high as $500 and $900 these days. Discounts on the Cube 1000 have gone as low as $313 one single time in March, while the Cube 2000 has gone as low as $539. The deals here are $170 and $361 markdowns off the going rates, landing them back at the second-lowest and all-time lowest prices we have tracked.
